g.text: 1. ALL DIMENSIONS ARE IN FEET AND INCHES UNLESS NOTED.
2. DO NOT SCALE DRAWINGS. VERIFY ALL DIMS IN FIELD.
3. ALL CONSTRUCTION PER LOCAL BUILDING CODE.
4. EXTERIOR WALLS: 2×6 STUDS @ 16" O.C. W/ R-21 INSUL.
6. ROOF: ARCH. SHINGLES 30-YR. R-38 ATTIC INSULATION.
8. SLAB ON GRADE: 4" CONC. W/ 6×6 W.W.F., VAPOR BARRIER.
9. ALL PLUMBING PER UNIFORM PLUMBING CODE (UPC).
10. SEE STRUCTURAL DWGS FOR BEAM/HEADER SIZES.
11. CONTRACTOR TO VERIFY ALL UTILITY LOCATIONS.
12. ALL ELECTRICAL PER NEC 2023. SEE E-SERIES DWGS.
